differentials.name: Endometriosis Use of transducer pressure may show lesion mobility if a lesion is in the endocervical canal (pedunculated intracavitary myoma / polyp). Lesions arising from the cervical stroma will remain fixed in position with transducer pressure.
differentials.raw: Endometriosis Use of transducer pressure may show lesion mobility if a lesion is in the endocervical canal (pedunculated intracavitary myoma / polyp). Lesions arising from the cervical stroma will remain fixed in position with transducer pressure.
